description: v1.1.1 — Version-only patch bump. Maintenance release following 1.1.0 to refresh the published npm tarball; no template or runtime changes beyond the version fields.
changelog:
**Version-only bump.**
- This release contains no template, runtime, or behavioral changes relative to 1.1.0. It is a maintenance patch to refresh the published npm tarball.
- Users on 1.1.0 can `trellis update` as a clean version bump with no diffs.
notes: Backfilled manifest — the 1.1.1 npm publish omitted this file. No migration required; identical template set to 1.1.0.
